sections.paragraph:
verb לשמוח

be happy, be glad, rejoice

verb לשמח

to make happy, gladden

verb לשמח (>>שימח)

to make happy, gladden

adjective

happy, merry, glad, jolly (Brit.) , delighted, cheerful, gay, joyful, joyous, fain, frolicsome, gamesome, genial, gladsome, gleeful, hilarious, jovial, jubilant, lighthearted, mirthful, rejoicer
